tool_output.output:
Based on the provided 10-K filing for the fiscal year ended December 31, 2024, here is the extracted data regarding "average monthly revenue per paying membership" (ARM), including all years and regions mentioned.

### Global Average Monthly Revenue per Paying Membership

| Year Ended December 31, | 2024 | 2023 | 2022 |
| :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- |
| **Average monthly revenue per paying membership** | **$11.70** | **$11.64** | **$11.76** |
| **Constant currency change** | 4% | - | - |

---

### Average Monthly Revenue per Paying Membership by Region

**United States and Canada (UCAN)**

| Year Ended December 31, | 2024 | 2023 | 2022 |
| :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- |
| **Average monthly revenue per paying membership** | **$17.20** | **$16.28** | **$15.86** |
| **Constant currency change** | 6% | - | - |

**Europe, Middle East, and Africa (EMEA)**

| Year Ended December 31, | 2024 | 2023 | 2022 |
| :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- |
| **Average monthly revenue per paying membership** | **$10.96** | **$10.87** | **$10.99** |
| **Constant currency change** | 1% | - | - |

**Latin America (LATAM)**

| Year Ended December 31, | 2024 | 2023 | 2022 |
| :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- |
| **Average monthly revenue per paying membership** | **$8.24** | **$8.66** | **$8.48** |
| **Constant currency change** | 21% | - | - |

**Asia-Pacific (APAC)**

| Year Ended December 31, | 2024 | 2023 | 2022 |
| :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- |
| **Average monthly revenue per paying membership** | **$7.29** | **$7.64** | **$8.50** |
| **Constant currency change** | (3)% | - | - |

parsed_args.prompt: Extract all data about Netflix's "average revenue per paying membership" or "average monthly revenue per paying member" or "ARPU" from this 10-K filing for the year ended December 31, 2019. Include all years mentioned. I want the exact figures as reported. Here is the filing: {{netflix_10k_2019}}

tool_output.output:
Based on the 10-K filing for the year ended December 31, 2019, here are all reported figures for "average monthly revenue per paying membership" (also referred to as ARPU) for the global total and each region, including all years mentioned (2017, 2018, 2019):

### Global (Consolidated)
| Year | Average Monthly Revenue per Paying Membership |
|------|-----------------------------------------------|
| 2019 | $10.82 |
| 2018 | $10.31 |
| 2017 | $9.43 |

### United States and Canada (UCAN)
| Year | Average Monthly Revenue per Paying Membership |
|------|-----------------------------------------------|
| 2019 | $12.57 |
| 2018 | $11.16 |
| 2017 | $9.97 |

### Europe, Middle East, and Africa (EMEA)
| Year | Average Monthly Revenue per Paying Membership |
|------|-----------------------------------------------|
| 2019 | $10.33 |
| 2018 | $10.45 |
| 2017 | $9.17 |

### Latin America (LATAM)
| Year | Average Monthly Revenue per Paying Membership |
|------|-----------------------------------------------|
| 2019 | $8.21 |
| 2018 | $8.19 |
| 2017 | $8.09 |

### Asia-Pacific (APAC)
| Year | Average Monthly Revenue per Paying Membership |
|------|-----------------------------------------------|
| 2019 | $9.24 |
| 2018 | $9.33 |
| 2017 | $9.11 |

**Note:** The filing also includes constant currency change percentages for each region, but those are not the ARPU figures themselves. The exact figures above are as reported in the document.
